dialogos.texto_en: Where should we start our search for souvenirs?
There are so many shops, it's easy to get lost.\nIt might take us a month just to choose something.
Ah, oh no!\nWhat if we don't decide on anything\nand can't leave Okinawa?!
That's not going to happen.
Whoa!\nWhen did you get here, Uesugi-san?
Futaro has also joined us.
But Uesugi-san, choosing the perfect souvenir is quite difficult, \nya know? We might never be able to leave Okinawa...!
Why would you think that?
I can't even think of anything.\nShould we just go around and look at shops?
Yeah, let's try that.
Mmmmhh,\nit's not so easy to find the perfect item, huh.
They all look good, but just slightly different.\nChoosing a perfect souvenir is harder than I thought.
If there's some sort of deciding factor,\nit might make it a bit easier to choose, right?
A deciding factor?
Ah, how about this?\nLet's look for something that everyone likes.
Something everyone likes...\nThat's even more difficult.
Ahh...\nRight, our tastes are all different.
And Futaro and Raiha-chan have joined us.\nNow that all of us are together, finding something everyone \nlikes will be even harder.
Th-that's too difficult!\nIs there really a souvenir that everybody likes?
It doesn't have to be something we all like.\nAs long as it's a good souvenir,\nthat's what matters.
True, but if we can find something we all like,\nit'll be even better.\nWe'll all have more attachment to it.
That is, if you can think of one.
Oh...\nWait a minute. I know something everyone likes.
Really?!
Really?\nI have no idea. What could it be?
Hmm...
...Why are you pointing at me?
Isn't there something behind you,\nUesugi-san?
D-don't scare me like that!
It's Futaro. That's what everyone likes.
...WHAAA?!
Oh, indeed!\nI also like you too, Uesugi-san.
What the...
Of course, as a friend, you know?\nWhy are you surprised?
I-I know that!
I mean, in a weird way.
I think it's natural for everyone, including Ichika.\nSo, our common interest is Futaro.
Wait, does it mean that I'm becoming everybody's souvenir?
Yes.
Do you think I'm a narcissist or something?
Futaro, you're kind of narcissistic, aren't you?
Yeah, sometimes it feels that way.
...Huh, really?\nNo way, I'm not like that, am I?
You are.
Yep, you are.
Huh...
*sigh*\nAnyway, talking about what we like\nisn't going to help us pick a souvenir, is it?
How about pictures of you, Futaro?\nWe could take seven different pictures of famous places\nin Okinawa, and share them with everyone.
I'm not sure how to react...\nEven if I'm told that I'm popular like that...
I just said what I was thinking.\nIs that a problem?
It's not a problem, but, it's just...
Hee hee hee.\nEveryone likes that about you, Uesugi-san.
Yes.
Okay, okay, you don't have to say it\nover and over again. It's not that I don't like it,\nbut it makes me uncomfortable.
*sigh*\nAnyway, talking about what we like\nisn't going to help us pick a souvenir, is it?
How about pictures of you, Futaro?\nWe could take seven different pictures of famous places\nin Okinawa, and share them with everyone.
Well, yeah, I guess that sounds about right.\nI'm confident that it'll always be like this...
Is that so?\nTell me about that feeling.
Wha?!\nWell, I can't really put it into words...
Aww, you're so shy, Uesugi-san.\nBut don't worry, I understand what you're trying to say.
Yeah, me too.\nBut I still want you to tell me properly.
So, should I record it \nand make it something we can listen to\nover and over again?
Hey, what did you just say, Miku?
Teehee, just kidding.
*sigh*\nAnyway, talking about what we like\nisn't going to help us pick a souvenir, is it?
How about pictures of you, Futaro?\nWe could take seven different pictures of famous places\nin Okinawa, and share them with everyone.
Wha?
Oh, that might be a good idea. Uesugi-san's celebrity style \npicture set of all seven places in Okinawa would be perfect!
No WAY that's happening!
Mmmmh, if the photos won't work,\nhow about getting Uesugi-san\nto sign something for us...
Rejected!
Whaaa!\nAt least hear me through to the end\nbefore deciding anything!
Now listen, enough with the jokes.\nLet's seriously start looking, okay?
Okay, I understand.\nWe were just teasing you because your reactions are funny.
I'm not a toy, you know...
Well, let's start by going to the biggest souvenir shop.\nMaybe we'll find some hidden treasures there.
Agreed.
Yeah, let's do that.
